title: Initial public list archive monitor after plain-text resend
question: Is the manually sent A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC descriptor-fetch question visible in public archives yet, or has any answer appeared?

inputs.sent_context: User manually resent the descriptor-fetch question from Gmail in plain text mode after HTML bounces. The subject accidentally omitted the final 'd' in 'read'.

findings.evidence: Search did not find the sent A733 IDMAC message on general web results or lore.kernel.org yet.
findings.interpretation: No public response or archive URL is available yet. This may be indexing delay or list moderation; it is not evidence of delivery failure by itself.

findings.evidence: No maintainer/list response, erratum, register, reset/clock ordering, firmware handoff, master ID, or binding change was found.
findings.interpretation: Do not create another behavior patch from the monitoring result.

next: Check Gmail for bounces/replies and public archives again later. Continue to avoid descriptor, DMA-mask, clock, or broad fabric patches until feedback or source evidence names one concrete runtime proof.
